response.justification: The candidate lacks the core C++ and Windows platform experience required for the role, having primarily worked with Node.js, TypeScript, JavaScript, and Dlang. While the resume shows strong full-stack and high-performance systems experience in other languages, there is no evidence of recent or substantial C++ development on Windows systems, which is mandatory for this role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and paradigms
Strong problem-solving and software craftsmanship skills (TDD, CI/CD, refactoring)
Experience with high-performance systems and low-latency applications in other domains
concerns: No demonstrated C++ development experience on Windows platform within the last 5-10 years
Lacks domain expertise in Fixed Income or Investment Banking as required
SQL experience mentioned but no specific mention of SQL Server or Oracle, which are required

key_factors.factor: Domain expertise in Fixed Income/Investment Banking
